inputs.correct_answer: The capital of Tuvalu is Funafuti.

outputs: Funafuti is the capital of Tuvalu.

inputs.correct_answer: The capital of Kiribati is Tarawa.
The capital of Comoros is Moroni.
The capital of Vanuatu is Port Vila.
Nauru does not have an official capital, but Yaren is the de facto capital.
The capital of Palau is Ngerulmud.
